collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (10 total Queries, 9 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN type_operation.libelle = 'depot' THEN montant - frais ELSE 0 END ) AS depot, SUM( CASE WHEN type_operation.libelle IN ('transfert', 'retrait') THEN montant + frais + commission ELSE 0 END ) AS sortie FROM `historique` JOIN `type_operation` ON `type_operation`.`id` = `historique`.`id_type_operation` WHERE `id_client` = 1

timelineData.query: SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN type_operation.libelle = 'depot' THEN montant - frais ELSE 0 END ) AS depot, SUM( CASE WHEN type_operation.libelle IN ('transfert', 'retrait') THEN montant + frais + commission ELSE 0 END ) AS sortie FROM `historique` JOIN `type_operation` ON `type_operation`.`id` = `historique`.`id_type_operation` WHERE `id_client` = 1
